sentiment: Even light years away, some signals are meant to be found.

stories.title: First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star
stories.summary: Scientists detected an atmosphere on an Earth-sized planet orbiting in its star's habitable zone — the first such discovery, bringing the search for life beyond our solar system into sharper focus.

stories.title: Regressive JPEGs
stories.summary: An exploration of how progressive JPEG decoding can reveal unexpected visual artifacts, turning image compression into an accidental form of generative art.
